title: -Cobble Hills-
description:
-Cobble Hills- is a modpack curated for the Cobblemon SMP Server Cobble Hills. We've curated a pack which has:
- All The Mons x Mega Showdown
- Journey Mounts
- Create (non-integral)
- Chipped
We welcome you to make your mark on our server and join us!
body: A Modpack curated for the Cobblemon SMP server, 'Cobble Hills'. Centered around Cobblemon, our pack includes 120+ community models to fill the gaps in our pokedexes, and make sure that there is no Pokemon left out. If collecting isn't your speed, then why not take on the Radical Cobble Trainer gauntlet and become a champion? If neither of those suit you, maybe you'd like to make an apricorn orchard with a well decorated cottage in the center of it all? Become the kind of trainer you want to be on Cobble Hills. Come make your mark on our world!
